title: Tiles hop
description: Tiles Hop is a web-based game where players control a bouncing ball that hops on a series of tiles. The objective is to keep the ball bouncing on the tiles without falling off, while collecting points and power-ups along the way. The game features simple controls, colorful graphics, and an engaging soundtrack to create an enjoyable gaming experience.
tech: Canvas API for rendering the game
Web Audio API for background music and sound effects
Local Storage for saving player progress and high scores
